title: rosa canina var. surculosa
intro: Rosa canina var. surculosa, also known as dwarf or shrub rose, is a compact, thornless variety of the Rosa canina species, a wild rose native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa canina var. surculosa include supporting eye health, improving cardiovascular health, and providing immune system support due to its high content of vitamin C and flavonoids. Rosa canina var. surculosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or oil, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and address various health issues.
